outside_date_extensions.condition: if regulatory approvals (antitrust or foreign investment) not obtained
outside_date_extensions.note: The outside date automatically extends by 6 months if all closing conditions except those related to Legal Restraints under Antitrust or Foreign Investment Law are satisfied or reasonably capable of being satisfied, provided the failure to close is not due to a breach by the terminating party.

regulatory_approvals.name: HSR Act
regulatory_approvals.notes: HSR filing must be submitted as soon as reasonably practicable post-agreement and clearance is a condition to closing.

static_events.label: Unanimously approved by Parent board; Target board approval not obtained
Outside Date (Extended)
static_events.note: The outside date automatically extends by 6 months if all closing conditions except those related to Legal Restraints under Antitrust or Foreign Investment Law are satisfied or reasonably capable of being satisfied, provided the failure to close is not due to a breach by the terminating party.

deadline_events.label: HSR Act Clearance
deadline_events.notes: HSR filing must be submitted as soon as reasonably practicable post-agreement and clearance is a condition to closing.

deadline_events.label: Baker Hughes notice of financing unavailability
deadline_events.calculation: Baker Hughes must inform Chart within 48 hours if any part of the Debt Financing becomes unavailable.

deadline_events.label: Chart notice of Takeover Proposal (direct receipt)
deadline_events.calculation: Chart must inform Baker Hughes within 24 hours of directly receiving a Chart Takeover Proposal or related inquiry.

deadline_events.label: Chart notice of Takeover Proposal (via Representatives)
deadline_events.calculation: Chart must inform Baker Hughes within 48 hours if a Chart Takeover Proposal or related inquiry is received by external Representatives.

deadline_events.label: Chart Notice Period for negotiations
deadline_events.calculation: Chart makes itself available to negotiate with Baker Hughes in good faith during the four Business Days following Baker Hughes' receipt of the Chart Notice.

deadline_events.label: Breach cure period
deadline_events.calculation: If a party's breach is curable, the breaching party has 45 days after receiving written notice to cure before the other party may terminate the agreement.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +30 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Clearance Obtained
downstream.rule: HSR filing must be submitted as soon as reasonably practicable post-agreement and clearance is a condition to closing.

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: SEC Review Window Opens
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review period (not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +3 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived

checklist: Baker Hughes Company stockholder meeting date
Chart Industries, Inc. stockholder meeting date (vote)
